cards.def: A folder tracked by git, with full history of every change.
cards.defZh: 一个被 git 追踪的文件夹，记录了每一次改动的完整历史。

cards.def: A labelled snapshot in time. Created with git commit -m "...".
cards.defZh: 一份带说明的快照，用 git commit -m "..." 创建。

cards.def: A parallel timeline. Lets you try changes without touching main.
cards.defZh: 一条平行时间线。让你试改动而不影响主线。

cards.def: Folding one branch's commits into another.
cards.defZh: 把一条分支的提交并入另一条。

cards.def: A formal proposal to merge a branch — gets reviewed and discussed.
cards.defZh: 把分支并入主干的正式申请——会被审阅和讨论。

cards.def: Your own copy of someone else's repo on GitHub.
cards.defZh: 把别人的仓库复制成你账户下的版本。

cards.def: Download a repo (with history) onto your laptop.
cards.defZh: 把仓库（带历史）下载到本地电脑。

cards.def: A linked copy of your repo on a server (origin = GitHub).
cards.defZh: 你的仓库在服务器上的关联副本（origin 通常是 GitHub）。

cards.def: The default name for your main remote — usually GitHub.
cards.defZh: 默认远程的别名，通常是 GitHub。

cards.def: The default branch name. (Used to be 'master'.)
cards.defZh: 默认主分支名字。（以前叫 master。）

cards.def: Pointer to the commit you're currently on.
cards.defZh: 指向你当前所在 commit 的指针。

cards.def: Mark files for the next commit (git add).
cards.defZh: 把文件标记进下一次 commit（git add）。

cards.def: Send your local commits to the remote.
cards.defZh: 把本地 commit 上传到远程。

cards.def: Fetch remote commits and merge them locally.
cards.defZh: 把远程 commit 拉到本地并合并。

cards.def: List of files git should ignore (node_modules, .env, dist).
cards.defZh: git 应该忽略的文件列表（node_modules、.env、dist）。

cards.def: The front-door file shown on github.com — what + how + why.
cards.defZh: github.com 上展示的门面文件——是什么、怎么用、为什么。

cards.def: What others are allowed to do with your code.
cards.defZh: 别人对你代码可以做什么的法律说明。

cards.def: Most permissive license. 'Use it for anything; keep my name in.'
cards.defZh: 最宽松的许可证：'随便用，保留我名字。'

cards.def: Like MIT, plus a patent grant.
cards.defZh: 类似 MIT，多了一份专利授权。

cards.def: Copyleft — if you redistribute, your changes must also be open-source.
cards.defZh: Copyleft——你重发布时，改动也必须开源。

cards.def: A thread for one bug, feature, or question.
cards.defZh: 一个 bug、功能或问题的讨论串。

cards.def: Tags on issues/PRs — bug, enhancement, good first issue.
cards.defZh: 议题或 PR 上的标签——bug、enhancement、good first issue。

cards.def: Free static hosting that serves your repo as a website.
cards.defZh: 免费的静态托管，把你的仓库当成网站发布。

cards.def: Tiny robots that run on push, PR, or schedule. Free for personal use.
cards.defZh: 在 push、PR 或定时事件上运行的小机器人。个人使用免费。

cards.def: A YAML file in .github/workflows/ that tells Actions what to do.
cards.defZh: .github/workflows/ 里的 YAML 文件，告诉 Actions 该做什么。

cards.def: The GitHub CLI. Lets you do GitHub-website-things from the terminal.
cards.defZh: GitHub 命令行工具。让你在终端里完成 GitHub 网站的操作。

cards.def: The line-by-line difference between two versions.
cards.defZh: 两个版本之间逐行的差异。

cards.def: When git can't auto-merge two branches and asks you to choose.
cards.defZh: git 无法自动合并两条分支，需要你来取舍的情况。

cards.def: Collapse multiple commits into one before merging.
cards.defZh: 合并前把多个 commit 压成一个。

cards.def: A named, frozen point in history — usually a version (v1.0.0).
cards.defZh: 历史上一个命名的冻结点——通常是一个版本号（v1.0.0）。
